24.kj: apply, appoint, array, bring, consider, lay (up), let alone, [idiom] look, make, mark, put (on), [phrase] regard, set, shew, be stayed, [idiom] take.
craft, deceit(-ful, -fully), false, feigned, guile, subtilly, treachery.

25.dv: a primitive root; (Isaiah 30:21; interchangeable with H541 (אָמַן), to go to the right hand)

25.dv: or קֹל; from an unused root meaning to call aloud;
